query:
SELECT 
  id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate,
  awayML, homeML,
  awayRunLine, awayRunLineOdds, homeRunLine, homeRunLineOdds,
  bookTotal, overOdds, underOdds,
  modelAwayML, modelHomeML,
  modelAwayWinPct, modelHomeWinPct,
  modelTotal, modelOverRate, modelUnderRate,
  modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore,
  modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds,
  awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread,
  awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread,
  modelSpreadClamped, modelTotalClamped,
  spreadEdge, totalEdge,
  modelRunAt
FROM games 
WHERE gameDate = '2026-05-13' AND sport = 'MLB' AND awayTeam = 'ARI';
